findings.description: Adversarial critic caught that READ-ONLY agents cannot write AUDIT.md. Skill must aggregate and write persistent artifacts itself.
findings.proposedRule: P10: Persistent artifacts need a skill-level synthesis step

findings.description: AUDIT.md follows identical structural pattern to LANDSCAPE.md: optional, timestamped, freshness-checked, consumer-agnostic protocol, loaded on demand.
findings.proposedRule: P11: Reference documents follow a reusable template

findings.description: Audit protocol first pass was 214 words (43% over ~150 target). Structural rewrite to 123 words worked; word trimming alone would not.
findings.proposedRule: P15: Protocol compression requires structural rewrite, not word trimming

findings.description: Both sw-design (+14 vs <=10) and sw-learn (+36 vs <=15) exceeded spec word-count limits on first pass, requiring fix commit.
findings.proposedRule: P16: Measure baseline word counts before implementing spec word-count limits

findings.description: Dedicated docs task as final build task yielded 0 WARN/BLOCK wiring findings (19/19 passed) vs 6+ in previous units.
findings.proposedRule: P17: Dedicate a documentation task as the final build task
